items.title: Conversation practice
items.body:
Answer aloud first. Then complete the exercises.

Examples:
• Do you help your wife at home?
• Do you prefer to speak English or Spanish?
• Do you want to help me tomorrow?
• Do you want to go to the beach with me?
• 1- When do you help your parents? / friends / neighbor

items.text: Do you help your wife at home?
Do you prefer to speak English or Spanish?
Do you want to help me tomorrow?

items.answer: Do you want to go to the beach with me?
1- When do you help your parents? / friends / neighbor

items.text: Do you prefer to speak English or Spanish?
6- Do you eat popcorn at the movies? / candy / chocolate
